mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_source ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM data_source WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO data_source (name, url, type, region, category, crawl_config, status, crawl_interval) VALUES (#{name}, #{url}, #{type}, #{region}, #{category}, #{crawlConfig}, #{status}, #{crawlInterval})
mapper.update: UPDATE data_source SET last_crawl_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE data_source SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
